title: hedeoma plicata
intro: Hedeoma plicata, also known as plicate pennyroyal or fragrant pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain high levels of pulegone and other compounds with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of hedeoma plicata include relief from headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Hedeoma plicata can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
